records.ety: [F. lentille, fr. L. lenticula, dim. of lens, lentis, lentil. Cf. Lens.]

defs: A leguminous plant of the genus Ervum (Ervum Lens), of small size, common in the fields in Europe. Also, its seed, which is used for food on the continent.
notes: ☞ The lentil of the Scriptures probably included several other vetchlike plants.
